description_long: This is a multi-strand beaded necklace featuring alternating sections of turquoise and black cylindrical beads, interspersed with small silver-toned spacers. The necklace is arranged in three parallel strands, each meticulously aligned to create a layered effect. The turquoise beads are prominent at the front, while the black beads form the upper and side portions, giving the piece a striking contrast. The beads appear to be made of polished stone or glass, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly. The necklace is displayed on a neutral, matte-finished bust stand, emphasizing its elegant drape and color pattern. The overall design is geometric and symmetrical, with a modern yet classic appeal.
description: A three-strand beaded necklace with turquoise and black cylindrical beads, accented by silver-toned spacers and arranged in a layered, geometric pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full layered arrangement of turquoise and black beads, with the turquoise beads most prominent at the center.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile and curvature of the necklace, with the alternating bead colors visible along the strand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the necklace's closure area and the uppermost beads, mostly black and turquoise, with less detail on the layered effect.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace's drape and the alternating bead pattern along the strand.
